title: alnus glutinosa f. quercifolia
intro: Alnus glutinosa f. quercifolia, also known as the English alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a variety of the common alder tree (Alnus glutinosa). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Alnus glutinosa f. quercifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Alnus glutinosa f. quercifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and ointments for topical applications.
